data.title: Akari Therapeutics Releases CEO Corner Highlighting Strategic Progress and Path to Clinical Development Under CEO Abizer Gaslightwala
data.description: Under the leadership of Abizer Gaslightwala, significant strategic milestones have been reached at Akari Therapeutics. This includes progress in the development of AKTX-101 and the expansion of the company's ADC pipeline. These achievements showcase the company's commitment to innovation and growth in the field.

data.title: WeShop Launches "Shopping Starts Here" Promotional Campaign in the UK
data.description: The "Shopping Starts Here" initiative in the UK offers users on the WeShop app higher ShareBack rewards when they shop at numerous retailers. WeShop's unique ShareBack program allows users to accumulate equity in WeShop with every purchase or referral they make. Participants have the opportunity to earn ownership in WeShop through this program, making it a lucrative incentive for users.

data.title: Mutinex Bolsters Its U.S. Presence with the Appointments of Two High‑Profile Leaders; Mike Finnerty Named President, United States, Lou Paskalis Elevated to Senior Advisor
data.description: Mutinex, a prominent agentic marketing effectiveness platform, has appointed Mike Finnerty as the new President for the United States. Finnerty, who previously held a crucial position at TransUnion overseeing the expansion of measurement and identity services post the Neustar acquisition, will lead the charge in enhancing growth and customer success for U.S. enterprise clients. This strategic move aims to solidify Mutinex's position in the market, leveraging Finnerty's expertise in scaling capabilities, with an emphasis on the American market segment.

data.title: RLJ Lodging Trust Announces Dividends for First Quarter of 2026
data.description: In Bethesda, Maryland, RLJ Lodging Trust (NYSE: RLJ) shared news about dividends. The Board of Trustees approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.15 per common share, payable on April 15, 2026, to shareholders of record by March 31, 2026. Additionally, a quarterly cash dividend of $0.4875 was declared for the Company’s Series A Preferred Shares, payable on April 30, 2026. Shareholders of record by March 31, 2026, will receive this dividend.

data.title: Recon Technology, Ltd Reports Financial Results for the First Six Months of Fiscal Year 2026
data.description: In a recent announcement on March 13, 2026, Recon Technology, Ltd (NASDAQ: RCON), a company operating in China as an independent solutions integrator within various industries, disclosed its financial performance. Recon specializes in providing services for oilfield, environmental protection, electric power, and coal chemical sectors. The company shared important numbers from its financial report without specifying the exact details.

data.title: Microsoft's Quality Rank Hits New High As Texas AI Data Center Expansion In Focus
data.description: Microsoft Corp. (NASDAQ: MSFT) has achieved a new high in operational excellence, with its quality ranking rising to the 90.05th percentile. This marks a notable increase from 89.96 last week. The tech giant is reported to be strengthening its AI infrastructure in Abilene, Texas. Benzinga Edge Stock Rankings has placed Microsoft in the top tier for financial health and operational efficiency. Despite the impressive quality score, Microsoft is experiencing negative price trends, with the stock seeing a decline across short, medium, and long-term timeframes. The momentum score is currently at a low 20.40, indicating that the market has not yet reflected the company's fundamental improvements in its stock price. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Lassonde Industries Inc. Will Hold a Conference Call to Discuss Its Fourth Quarter and Fiscal 2025 Financial Results
data.description: ROUGEMONT, Quebec - Lassonde Industries Inc. (TSX: LAS.A) is set to hold a conference call on March 27, 2026, to review its financial performance for the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2025. The call will be led by CEO Mr. Vince Timpano and CFO Mr. Eric Gemme.

data.title: First Bancorp Announces Cash Dividend
data.description: On March 13, 2026, in Southern Pines, North Carolina, the Board of Directors of First Bancorp (NASDAQ: FBNC) announced a cash dividend of $0.24 per share on its common stock. This dividend is scheduled to be paid out on April 27, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of that date.

data.title: Re Sustainability and Indian Oil Join Hands to Create India's First Integrated Used Oil Circular Economy Ecosystem
data.description: In Mumbai, India on March 13, 2026, Re Sustainability has entered into an exclusive Memorandum of Understanding with Indian Oil Corporation Limited to introduce India's inaugural organized national effort for gathering and reusing used lubricating oil. This collaboration aims to facilitate the methodical retrieval and recycling of lubricating oil, marking a significant step in promoting sustainability.

data.title: Being a data breach victim is common; don't disregard notification letters. Data incidents are widespread.
data.description: Incidents involving data breaches have grown increasingly frequent, to the point where individuals may consider discarding notification letters. Despite this trend, professionals advise against such actions.
